title: Berserk Mace
description: Replaces the mace with the Dragon Slayer from Berserk.
body:
Replaces the mace with the Dragon Slayer from Berserk. Hit sounds replaced with CLANG 2016 (usual smash) and metal pipe meme (heavy ground smash).
Skin from screenshots https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/guts-4412679/
